properties.evidence: As was learned from the experience with products such as rosiglitazone in people with type 2 diabetes, not all favorable changes in serum lipid characteristics translate into a reduction in CVD events.

rejected_candidates.text: sources (e.g. PubMed) it is difficult to find systematic reviews of the evidence for the many natural remedies that have putative benefit in promoting a healthier lipid profile.
